rules.rule_text:
rule b64_xml_doc
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$b64_xml = "PD94bWwg"
		$docx1 = "b3BlbmRvY3VtZW50"
		$docx2 = "InBhcmFncmFwaCI"
		$docx3 = "b2ZmaWNlL3dvcmQv"
		$docx4 = "RG9jdW1lbnRQcm9wZXJ0aWVz"

	condition:
		$b64_xml at 0 and 3 of ( $docx* )
}
